## Summary

<!-- A short, scannable description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Use "Closes #N" or "Refs #N" to link the related issue. -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] test — adding or correcting tests
- [ ] chore — tooling, build, infrastructure
- [ ] ci — CI/CD configuration

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits used (`type(scope): summary`)
- [ ] Commits are signed
- [ ] Tests added/updated where behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation updated (READMEs, ADRs, comments)
- [ ] CI checks passing locally (lint, security)
- [ ] **Pre-PR security audit completed** (see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md))
- [ ] **GitHub Copilot review received on the latest commit**
- [ ] **All valid Copilot review comments resolved**

## Hard invariants

- [ ] **No PHI on-chain** — only hashes, DIDs, CIDs, coded values, status, timestamps
- [ ] **No real PHI** in this PR's tests, fixtures or examples — synthetic only
- [ ] **No secrets**, credentials, real tokens, or real certificates committed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should know up front: trade-offs, areas needing
     extra scrutiny, intentional deviations, deferred work. -->
